sections.paragraph:
γαμετή, ῆς, ἡ (s. γαμέω; Hes. et al.; PTebt 104, 17 [I b.c.]; POxy 795, 4; SIG 921, 110; OGI 206, 9; Jos., Bell. 1, 475, Ant. 1, 209; 4 Macc 2:11) a woman with married status (opp. concubine) wife 1 Cl 6:3.—DELG s.v. γαμέω.

Hes Hes , date uncertain, perh. before VI b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PTebt PTebt = The Tebtunis Papyri—List 4

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

opp. opp. = opposed to, opposite

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 187
